info.title: Apicurio Axiom API
info.description: REST API for the Apicurio Axiom event-driven project orchestration platform.

get.description: Returns the list of AI models that can be used for action type configuration.
Returns the list of AI engine types that are available (e.g. claude-code, opencode).

parameters.name: filterName
parameters.description: Substring filter on project name or issue reference

parameters.name: filterStatus
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of status values to include

post.description: Sets the project status to Completed.
Sets the project status to InProgress.

get.summary: List conversation thread entries for a project

post.summary: Add an entry to the project thread

200.description: List of events related to this project

get.summary: List tasks assigned to an actor (paginated)

parameters.name: filterActionType
parameters.description: Filter by action type name (substring match)

parameters.name: filterStatus
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of task statuses to include

200.description: Paginated list of tasks assigned to this actor

get.summary: Get an action type by ID
Get an event source by ID

post.description: Invokes Claude Code to generate or update a report definition's prompt template and allowed tools.

put.description: Replace the labels on a generated report.

get.summary: Get the execution log for a report

404.description: Report not found or no log available

parameters.name: filterInvocationType
parameters.description: Filter by invocation type (task or manager)

parameters.name: filterDateFrom
parameters.description: Start date filter (inclusive, ISO-8601 date e.g. 2026-01-15)

parameters.name: filterDateTo
parameters.description: End date filter (inclusive, ISO-8601 date e.g. 2026-01-31)

200.description: Paginated list of AI usage records

post.summary: Fire a new event for processing

get.summary: Get a single event by ID

parameters.name: filterEntryType
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of entry types to include

200.description: Paginated list of activity log entries

get.summary: Get the execution log for an activity entry
get.description: Returns the detailed execution log stored in the activity entry's details field.

404.description: Activity entry not found or no log available

post.summary: Evaluate an event with the AI Manager (debug)
post.description: Invokes the AI Manager to evaluate a specific event and return its decisions. This is a debug/testing endpoint — in production, events are evaluated automatically via the pipeline.

post.summary: Cancel a stuck or in-progress task
post.description: Marks the task as Failed with a cancellation reason. Use this to unstick tasks that are stuck in InProgress or AwaitingInput.

post.summary: Submit a human response to a task
post.description: Submits a user response for a task that is awaiting human input.

404.description: Task not found or not awaiting input

get.summary: Get the execution log for a task
get.description: Returns the human-readable execution transcript for a completed or failed task.

404.description: Task not found or no log available

get.description: Returns per-project disk usage and AI cost metrics.

parameters.name: filterName
parameters.description: Filter by name or description (substring match)

get.summary: Get a tool definition by ID

post.description: Invokes Claude Code to generate or update a tool definition based on a natural language instruction.

get.summary: List tools associated with an action type

200.description: List of tools for this action type

put.summary: Set the tools associated with an action type
put.description: Replaces the full list of tool associations for this action type. Pass an array of tool definition IDs.

post.description: Invokes Claude Code to generate or update a script template for a script-mode action type.

post.summary: AI-assisted prompt template and tools editing
post.description: Invokes Claude Code to generate or update the prompt template and allowed tools for an actor-mode action type.

get.description: Returns secret names and descriptions. Values are never returned.

post.summary: Test a tool by executing its script template with provided parameter values

get.summary: List poll logs for an event source

engine.description: The active AI engine type (e.g. claude-code, opencode)

eventId.description: Originating event ID (correlation ID for tracing)

allowedTools.description: Tools the actor is allowed to use when performing this action

promptTemplate.description: Prompt template sent to the AI agent when executing this action type. Supports placeholders: {{managerInput}}, {{issueRef}}, {{repository}}, {{projectName}}, {{issueTitle}}

scriptTemplate.description: Bash script template for script-mode action types. Supports placeholders: {{projectId}}, {{eventId}}, {{taskId}}, {{issueRef}}, {{repository}}, {{projectName}}, {{managerInput}}, {{apiBaseUrl}}

model.description: AI model override for this action type (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6). When empty, the global default is used.

environment.description: Custom environment variables for the subprocess. Values can reference secrets using ${secret:NAME} syntax. When set, replaces the default all-secrets injection.

engine.description: AI engine override for this action type (e.g. opencode, claude-code). When empty, the global default engine is used.

allowedTools.description: Tools the actor is allowed to use when performing this action

promptTemplate.description: Prompt template sent to the AI agent when executing this action type. Supports placeholders: {{managerInput}}, {{issueRef}}, {{repository}}, {{projectName}}, {{issueTitle}}

scriptTemplate.description: Bash script template for script-mode action types. Supports placeholders: {{projectId}}, {{eventId}}, {{taskId}}, {{issueRef}}, {{repository}}, {{projectName}}, {{managerInput}}, {{apiBaseUrl}}

model.description: AI model override for this action type (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6). When empty, the global default is used.

environment.description: Custom environment variables for the subprocess. Values can reference secrets using ${secret:NAME} syntax. When set, replaces the default all-secrets injection.

engine.description: AI engine override for this action type (e.g. opencode, claude-code). When empty, the global default engine is used.

secretName.description: Name of the secret to use for authentication (from Secrets store). Falls back to default provider secret if not set.
Name of the secret to use for authentication (from Secrets store). Falls back to default provider secret if not set.

eventSourceId.description: ID of the Event Source that produced this event, if applicable

environment.description: Custom environment variables. Values can reference secrets using ${secret:NAME} syntax.

scheduleDayOfWeek.description: Day of week for weekly schedules (e.g. monday, tuesday)

timeoutSeconds.description: Optional timeout in seconds for report generation. Overrides the global default when set.

initialLabels.description: Labels automatically applied to new reports generated from this definition

environment.description: Custom environment variables. Values can reference secrets using ${secret:NAME} syntax.

scheduleDayOfWeek.description: Day of week for weekly schedules (e.g. monday, tuesday)

timeoutSeconds.description: Optional timeout in seconds for report generation. Overrides the global default when set.

initialLabels.description: Labels automatically applied to new reports generated from this definition

labels.description: Free-form labels for categorization and filtering

totalCostUsd.description: Sum of costUsd across ALL matching records (not just the current page)

totalInputTokens.description: Sum of inputTokens across ALL matching records

totalOutputTokens.description: Sum of outputTokens across ALL matching records

tools.description: List of tool strings in this toolset
List of tool strings in this toolset

value.description: The secret value (write-only, never returned in responses)

message.description: The user's instruction for creating or modifying the report prompt

currentPromptTemplate.description: The current prompt template, if any

reportName.description: The report definition name for context

reportDescription.description: The report definition description for context

promptTemplate.description: The generated or updated prompt template

allowedTools.description: Recommended allowed tools for this report

explanation.description: AI's explanation of what was generated or changed

message.description: The user's instruction for creating or modifying the script

currentScript.description: The current script template, if any

actionTypeName.description: The action type name for context

actionTypeDescription.description: The action type description for context

script.description: The generated or updated bash script template

explanation.description: AI's explanation of what was generated or changed

message.description: The user's instruction for creating or modifying the tool

explanation.description: AI's explanation of what was generated or changed

parameters.description: Parameter values to substitute into the script template

success.description: Whether the script exited with code 0

output.description: Combined stdout and stderr from the script

detail.description: Full detailed log of the poll cycle

source.description: Event source type (e.g. github, jira, internal)

tags.name: Manager
tags.description: AI Manager event evaluation and debugging

tags.name: Tools
tags.description: Custom tool definitions for AI agents
